title: Scar's 3D Spears
description: 3D textures of minecraft spears by MetalScar
body:
# **🗡️ Scar's 3D Spears Texture Pack**

![Minecraft 3D Spears by MetalScar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/269cef0231db095dcba12d6d54daaf098a0fe5d0.png)

**📜Description:**

This resource pack introduces a fully modeled 3D Spear weapon to Minecraft! Designed with attention to detail, it replaces the existing weapon set to give your world a more immersive and realistic combat experience. The spear comes with high-quality 3D geometry and custom textures that blend seamlessly with Minecraft’s vanilla style.

**✨Features:**

- 🧱 Fully 3D-modeled spear with smooth details

- 🎨 Custom textures that match the vanilla aesthetic

- ⚔️ Compatible with most combat-related datapacks and mods

- 🧩 Works with both OptiFine and Fabric/Quilt render mods (if using CIT)

**🧰Compatibility:**

- 🕹️ Minecraft Versions: 25w41a - 25w44a

- 📦 Resource Pack Format: Compatible with modern Minecraft versions

- 🧩 No external mods required 

**⚙️Installation:**

1. 📥 Download the .zip file from the Modrinth page.

2. 📁 Place it into your resourcepacks folder.

3. 🎮 Enjoy your new 3D spear!

**💡 Note:**
This pack only changes visual textures/models — it doesn’t alter gameplay mechanics. Perfect for adventure maps, PvP, or roleplay builds!
